_description: Expected v2 -> v3 lift. The v2 sample (v2-sample.json) has 16 payload keys (no schema_version, no source_agent, no dt fields, no enrich slots). After migrate_v2_to_v3, the v3 record should equal v3-sample.json: schema_version=3, source_agent='claude_code', start_ts_dt/end_ts_dt copied from start_iso/end_iso, intent/outcome/arc/topic null, entities empty. The 5 dense vectors carry over unchanged; sparse + multivec stay empty (P4 will fill them).

invariants.point_id_unchanged: uuid_v5(NAMESPACE_DNS, session_id) — same in v2 and v3, so re-upserts are idempotent.
invariants.v2_collection_untouched: Reads dual-fall-back to v2 but writes never go there during the migration.
